title: ECIL South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ECIL South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? ECIL South Asia Partners in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ECIL South Asia Partners:
ECIL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL South Asia Partners!
